creator: tomek@cedro.info
text: Feedback from the future: I am on 13-STABLE now, previously 13.0-RELEASE, graphics works like a charm on Intel laptop (Panasonic Toughbook), quite efficiently, multiple monitors setup with Enlightenment WM, BIG THANK YOU, and I am really happy that we did not go the Linux way, FreeBSD ROX! Thank you :-)
